summary: Frontend engineer with six years of professional experience in design systems, accessible UI, and component architecture. Led an Angular-to-React migration, built a multi-theme Storybook design system, and shipped production tooling at Booz Allen Hamilton — earning three internal awards and a spot representing the team at AWS re:Invent.

experience.title: Founder
bullets: Founded a sliding-scale web studio serving nonprofits and small businesses — sole point of contact from engagement to launch, owning scope, architecture, design, build, and deployment.
Operate on a sliding-scale pricing model to keep production-quality web work accessible to mission-driven organizations with limited budgets.
Select stack to fit project scope — Astro for static-first sites, React or Next.js with Supabase when the work calls for it — always optimizing for speed, low overhead, and easy client handoff.
Hold every build to WCAG standards, screen-reader and keyboard-nav tested, mobile-first, with 100 Lighthouse scores.

positions.title: Lead Engineer
bullets: Promoted to Lead Engineer within a year, owning frontend architecture across a portfolio of security-critical applications.

Built and maintained a multi-theme Storybook design system and component library — including a convention registration platform used by 100+ attendees (Booz Allen Platinum Award) — and established the design practice from scratch with Figma training, team licenses, and production-ready workflows the whole team adopted.

Designed and delivered a stepper-driven data portal in close collaboration with stakeholders — interactive prototypes won buy-in over a competing proposal, directly influencing a multi-year contract award and earning a Booz Allen Gold Award.

Identified and scoped an opportunity for a secure LLM-powered chatbot, coordinated with MLOps to stand up the low-side environment, and owned the frontend interface and UX polish from prototype through production.

positions.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Led an Angular-to-React migration focused on UI structure, component reuse, and long-term maintainability — establishing the design system and workflows the team still uses; the redesigned application earned recognition from Amazon developers at AWS re:Invent and a Booz Allen Gold Award.
Owned Section 508 compliance across production applications, authoring shared accessibility standards and patterns that made interfaces usable by default.
Introduced Prettier, ESLint, Husky, and TanStack Query — modernizing the frontend toolchain and shifting the team from class-based to functional components.
Supported QA team with smoke test authoring and test documentation; trained testers on Postman for API validation ahead of UI availability.
Authored onboarding documentation and accessibility guides that reduced ramp-up time and made new developers productive faster.

experience.title: Founder
bullets: Founded a full-stack web studio delivering accessible, production-ready sites for small businesses and nonprofits, leading projects from scope through deployment.
Designed and built a multi-state employee portal and scheduling platform for a major restaurant franchise, still in active use after five years.
Established reusable component patterns and documentation across all client projects, reducing inconsistency and improving handoff.

experience.title: UI Developer
bullets: Delivered wireframes and interaction specs that defined the React component architecture for Defense Intelligence Agency web applications.
Authored accessibility and UI standards adopted as the shared reference for design and engineering alignment.

experience.title: Frontend Developer
bullets: Built a scroll-driven animated timeline for NGA analyst platforms using Vue, GSAP, and CSS — set as the visual reference standard for the project.
Translated motion-heavy design specs into accessible, high-fidelity components without sacrificing performance, including hands-on JAWS screen reader testing during accessibility validation.

projects.title: no-wb.org
projects.description: Job search dashboard built on the Hiring Without Whiteboards dataset. Watches the upstream repo for merged PRs via GitHub Actions, pulls the latest data on merge, and writes to static JSON — no database, no server. Full-text search, filtering, pagination. Astro, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: GAM[fest]
projects.description: Marketing site for a gaming event, built with Astro and React islands — static-first, with hydration limited to the gallery, FAQ, and a hero mini-game. That hero banner hides a real Canvas2D/Matter.js platformer with gravity, collision, sprite animation, and a real-time day/night cycle. Fully keyboard-navigable, with reduced-motion fallbacks, an accessible alternative to the canvas game, and axe-core/Playwright test coverage. Astro, React, Matter.js, Playwright.

projects.title: NPC Finder
projects.description: Invite-only full-stack media tracker and playlist app. Supabase Auth, PostgreSQL with row-level security, and role-based sharing keep data isolated per user while still supporting collaborative lists. React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, TanStack Query, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Vercel.

Combined: TypeScript • JavaScript • React • Next.js • Astro • Vue • Tailwind CSS • Framer Motion • GSAP • Storybook • TanStack Query • Playwright • Jest • Figma • Design Systems • WCAG • Section 508 • Supabase • PostgreSQL • Vercel • Git • GitHub Copilot • Claude
